this_title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula: Titans Season 2
trans_title: 伯莱特兄弟的德古拉：泰坦 第二季
introduction: Shudder has renewed the Emmy-nominated reality competition series “The Boulet Brothers’ Dragula” for a seventh season and renewed its all-star spinoff, “The Boulet Brothers’ Dragula: Titans,” for a second season.
chinese_title: 伯莱特兄弟的德古拉：泰坦 第二季
foreign_title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula: Titans Season 2
